changes.value:
Compile error in `swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/server.rs` line 846.

The `McpServer` struct initializer is missing the `tool_config_watcher` field, which is defined on the struct (line 90) but not populated in one of the constructor paths.

Error:
```
error[E0063]: missing field `tool_config_watcher` in initializer of `mcp::server::McpServer`
   --> swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/server.rs:846:9
    |
846 |         McpServer {
    |         ^^^^^^^^^ missing `tool_config_watcher`
```

The field is correctly initialized in the other constructor (line 286) with:
```rust
tool_config_watcher: Arc::new(Mutex::new(super::tool_config::ToolConfigWatcher::new())),
```

The initializer at line 846 needs the same field added.
Fix compile error: missing field `tool_config_watcher` in McpServer initializer at server.rs:846
